工作空间内你有权查看的工单: Tickets you can access in this workspace
工作空间统一维护角色定义，并按工作空间或具体组织分配。: Define roles once, then assign them across the workspace or to individual organizations.
工作空间组织树的根节点: Root of the workspace organization tree
管理当前工作空间的轻量组织树: Manage the lightweight organization tree for this workspace
仅无子组织、无有效成员且没有业务引用的组织可以删除。: Only organizations without children, active members, or business references can be deleted.
请立即复制并妥善保存，这个 Token 不会再次显示。: Copy and store this token now. It will not be shown again.
请先在角色与权限中创建组织角色: Create an organization role in Roles and permissions first
请选择你所属的组织作为工单来源。: Select one of your organizations as the ticket source.
删除后，所有用户和组织成员将失去该角色。: Users and organization members will lose this role after deletion.
为当前工作空间选择权限和有效期。Token 创建后只显示一次。: Choose permissions and an expiration for this workspace. The token is shown only once.
新组织必须挂在当前工作空间已有组织下。: New organizations must have an existing parent in this workspace.
选择工单查看会话: Select a ticket to view its conversation
移除成员关系不会删除工作空间用户。: Removing this membership does not delete the workspace user.
组织不存在或无权访问: Organization not found or access denied
添加平台用户需要拥有用户搜索、平台成员添加和平台角色查看权限，并至少存在一个平台: Adding a platform user requires user search, platform member add, and platform role view permissions, and at least one platform role.
搜索已有用户，并为其分配一个平台角色。: Search existing users and assign a platform role.
输入邮箱、名称或手机号: Enter email, name, or mobile number
上传成功但未返回图片地址: Upload succeeded but did not return an image URL
为已有用户授予平台角色，控制其可使用的平台能力: Grant platform roles to existing users and control platform access
为组织配置可用能力和开关: Configure available organization capabilities and switches
为组织配置通知目的地和消息服务: Configure notification destinations and message services
为组织配置默认控制项和自定义设置。: Configure default controls and custom settings for the organization.
使用 Markdown 描述问题；输入 @邮箱 或 @用户名可提及成员: Describe the issue with Markdown; type @email or @username to mention members
使用 Markdown、图片附件和 @邮箱 或 @用户名提及。: Supports Markdown, image attachments, and @email or @username mentions.
使用管理员账号进入工作台: Use an admin account to enter the workspace
创建一条自定义设置，并为后续编辑保存类型信息。: Create a custom setting and save type metadata for later edits.
创建管理员账号和默认组织: Create the admin account and default organization
动态配置组织能力，保存后立即生效。: Configure organization capabilities dynamically; changes apply immediately after saving.
平台用户管理需要同时拥有平台成员、平台角色和用户搜索权限。: Platform user management requires platform member, platform role, and user search permissions.
作为工作空间未配置模板时的全局回退: Global fallback used when a workspace has no template configured
当前用户没有管理端访问权限: The current user does not have admin console access
当前组织已关闭工单提交，普通成员只能查看已有工单。: Ticket submission is disabled for this organization. Members can only view existing tickets.
当前账号无权查看平台用户。: Current account cannot view platform users.
当前账号无权查看平台角色。: Current account cannot view platform roles.
当前账号无权修改平台设置: Current account cannot modify platform settings
当前账号无权修改组织设置: Current account cannot modify organization settings
当前角色不能访问此页面。: The current role cannot access this page.
当前角色没有工单页面访问权限，或平台已关闭工单入口。: The current role cannot access tickets, or the platform ticket entry is disabled.
您可以在这里配置个人资料、组织与平台设置。: Configure profile, organization, and platform settings here.
新密码至少 8 位: New password must be at least 8 characters
显示平台级默认值，组织侧可在自己的控制项中覆盖。: Shows platform defaults; organizations can override them in their controls.
显示当前账号仍可访问的设备。: Shows devices that can still access this account.
普通成员只能查看已有平台工单，不能新建。: Regular members can only view existing platform tickets and cannot create new ones.
枚举设置值不在选项范围内: Enum setting value is outside the allowed options
枚举设置至少需要一个选项: Enum settings require at least one option
枚举选项值不能为空: Enum option value cannot be empty
由平台统一配置，可被组织侧覆盖的控制项。: Controls configured globally by the platform and overridable by organizations.
查看当前账号已经登录的浏览器终端: View browser sessions signed in to the current account
维护当前组织的成员账号和角色: Maintain member accounts and roles for the current organization
维护组织内成员分组，便于协作和细分管理。: Manage member groups for collaboration and segmented administration.
至少输入 2 个字符开始搜索: Enter at least 2 characters to search
这些记录已经不能继续访问账号，查看后可直接删除。: These records can no longer access the account and can be deleted after review.
管理当前组织的功能开关: Manage feature switches for the current organization
允许当前组织成员提交组织工单: Allow current organization members to submit organization tickets
允许有处理权限的成员接收、回复并关闭组织工单: Allow members with handling permission to receive, reply to, and close organization tickets
允许用户通过邮件重置密码: Allow users to reset passwords by email
开启后仅管理员可访问系统: Only administrators can access the system when enabled
允许新用户自行注册: Allow new users to register themselves
当前组织已关闭工单处理，有处理权限的成员只能查看自己参与的工单。: Organization ticket handling is disabled. Members with handling permission can only view tickets they participate in.
留空后根据显示名称生成: Leave empty to generate from display name
维护你的名称和邮箱，头像只能通过图片上传更新: Manage your name and email. Your avatar can only be updated by uploading an image.
更新当前账号的登录密码: Update the login password for the current account
当前账号无权访问组织列表。: Current account cannot access the organization list.
当前租户内的组织管理视图: Manage organizations in the current tenant.
创建后进入该组织的完整配置页。: After creation, open the full configuration page for this organization.
留空后根据名称生成: Leave empty to generate from the name
暂无邮件模板。点击“添加模板”创建第一个。: No email templates yet. Click "Add template" to create the first one.
布尔设置值必须为 true 或 false: Boolean setting value must be true or false
当前账号无权访问平台设置。: Current account cannot access platform settings.
平台默认值、工作空间治理与公共服务: Platform defaults, workspace governance, and shared services
用于全局展示和识别当前平台的基础信息: Basic information used for global display and platform identification
作为工作空间控制项的平台默认值，工作空间可按需覆写: Platform defaults for workspace controls; workspaces can override them as needed.
控制新组织创建入口和默认状态: Control the organization creation entry and default status
平台下全部组织的配置入口: Configuration entry for all organizations on the platform
平台级公共消息服务开关和提供方: Platform-wide shared messaging service switch and provider
控制用户入口和平台工单提交能力: Control user entry and platform ticket submission
工作空间未配置 SMTP 时使用的平台公共邮件服务: Public platform mail service used when a workspace has no SMTP configured
留空则保留当前密码: Leave empty to keep the current password
作为组织配置的默认键值，可由组织覆写: Default key-values for organization configuration, overridable by organizations
查看提交记录和待处理会话，打开工单后继续交流。: View submitted records and pending conversations. Open a ticket to continue the conversation.
支持 Markdown、图片附件和 @邮箱 或 @用户名提及。: Supports Markdown, image attachments, and @email or @username mentions.
输入 Markdown 消息；输入 @邮箱 或 @用户名可提及成员: Enter a Markdown message; type @email or @username to mention members
关闭后，这个工单会从你的待处理流程中移出。对方仍可继续回复并重新打开会话；当双方: After closing, this ticket leaves your pending workflow. The other party can still reply and reopen the conversation; when both sides close it, the ticket is archived.
维护组织名称、标识和生命周期: Maintain organization name, identifier, and lifecycle
停用后该组织用户不能继续登录: Users in this organization cannot sign in after it is disabled
用于平台默认组织选择: Used for platform default organization selection
通过上传图片更新组织头像: Update the organization avatar by uploading an image
为空时继承平台默认，选择后保存为组织覆写: Inherits the platform default when empty; selections are saved as organization overrides.
为空时继承平台设置，选择后保存为组织覆写: Inherits platform settings when empty; selections are saved as organization overrides.
新增组织专属设置，或覆写平台自定义默认值: Add organization-specific settings or override platform custom defaults
请求超时，请确认 API 服务已启动: Request timed out. Confirm the API service is running.
Token 只会显示一次。关闭页面后只能撤销并重新创建。: This token is shown only once. After closing the page, you can only revoke it and create a new one.
当前账号没有可授权给集成 Token 的权限: This account has no permissions that can be delegated to an integration token
当前页面仅适用于租户账号: This page is only available to tenant accounts
只能选择当前账号在该作用范围内已经拥有的权限。: You can only select permissions this account already has in the selected scope.
暂无已撤销或过期的集成 Token: No revoked or expired integration tokens
撤销后，这个集成 Token 将立即失效，无法恢复。: After revocation, this integration token becomes invalid immediately and cannot be restored.
登录已失效，请重新登录: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
没有其他可登出的设备: No other devices to sign out
此操作会删除该角色，已分配此角色的成员可能受到影响。: This will delete the role. Members assigned to it may be affected.
此操作会使除当前设备以外的所有活跃设备退出当前账号。: This will sign out every active device except the current one.
此操作会使该设备立即退出当前账号。: This will immediately sign this device out of the account.
此操作只会删除历史登录记录，不会影响当前账号。: This only deletes the historical login record and will not affect the current account.
将删除平台自定义设置: This will delete platform custom setting
将删除组织覆写设置: This will delete organization override setting
该设置继承平台默认值，无需删除组织覆写: This setting inherits the platform default; no organization override needs to be deleted
查看公开邀请链接、定向邀请和加入状态: View public invite links, directed invites, and join status
关闭后该用户将无法通过此邀请加入组织: After closing, this user can no longer join through this invite
关闭后该公开邀请链接将无法继续加入组织: After closing, this public invite link can no longer be used to join
已加入组织，请使用该账号登录。: You have joined the organization. Sign in with this account.
此操作会删除该平台角色，已分配此角色的平台用户可能受到影响。: This will delete the platform role. Platform users assigned to it may be affected.
当前账号没有查看组织成员的权限。: The current account does not have permission to view organization members.
当前账号没有查看组织设置的权限。: The current account does not have permission to view organization settings.
当前账号没有查看组织邀请的权限。: The current account does not have permission to view organization invitations.
当前账号无权移除平台用户: The current account cannot remove platform users
当前组织已撤销和过期 Token: Current organization revoked and expired tokens
管理当前组织内用户创建并使用的组织集成 Token。: Manage organization integration tokens created and used by users in the current organization.
密码已重置，请使用新密码登录。: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.
确认邀请链接后加入组织: Confirm the invitation link to join the organization
如果邮箱存在，重置链接将发送到该邮箱。: If the email exists, a reset link will be sent to it.
输入邮箱以接收密码重置链接: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
选择这个 Token 可使用的作用范围、有效期和权限。: Select the scope, expiration, and permissions available to this token.
邀请链接缺少必要参数: Invitation link is missing required parameters
邀请链接无效或已过期: Invitation link is invalid or expired
邀请你加入组织: invites you to join the organization
允许访问当前账号的登录设备与会话管理页面。: Allows access to login devices and session management for the current account.
允许访问当前组织的基础资料页面。: Allows access to the current organization's basic profile page.
允许访问当前组织的集成 Token 管理页面。: Allows access to integration token management for the current organization.
允许访问个人账号资料与密码设置页面。: Allows access to personal profile and password settings.
允许访问平台工单和平台运营会话页面。: Allows access to platform tickets and operator conversations.
允许访问平台基础设施配置页面。: Allows access to platform infrastructure settings.
允许访问平台邮件模板页面。: Allows access to platform email templates.
允许访问平台组织列表与组织基础设施管理入口。: Allows access to the platform organization list and organization infrastructure entry points.
允许访问组织工单和会话页面。: Allows access to organization tickets and conversations.
允许访问组织功能开关页面。: Allows access to organization feature toggles.
允许访问组织角色和权限页面。: Allows access to organization roles and permissions.
允许访问组织通知配置页面。: Allows access to organization notification settings.
暂无当前组织已撤销或过期的集成 Token: No revoked or expired integration tokens in the current organization
暂无当前组织有效的集成 Token: No active integration tokens in the current organization
输入模板内容后将在这里显示预览。: Enter template content to see a preview here.
预览使用示例收件人、组织名称和链接变量。: The preview uses sample recipient, organization, and link variables.
删除工作空间模板后，将重新使用对应语言的系统模板。: Deleting the workspace template restores the system template for this language.
管理工作空间账号、状态和工作空间角色。组织归属在组织详情中维护。: Manage workspace accounts, status, and workspace roles. Organization membership is managed in organization details.
工作空间角色对所有组织生效；组织角色请在组织成员中分配。: Workspace roles apply across all organizations. Assign organization roles from organization members.
可留空，稍后通过邀请激活: Optional; the user can activate through an invite later
删除用户会立即撤销其会话和集成 Token，并移除所有组织成员关系。: Deleting this user immediately revokes their sessions and integration tokens and removes all organization memberships.
通过一个入口邀请用户，并同时分配工作空间角色和多个组织成员关系。: Invite users from one place and assign workspace roles and multiple organization memberships together.
受邀用户接受后，会在一个事务中获得账号、组织成员关系和所选角色。: When accepted, the account, organization memberships, and selected roles are created together.
撤销后，邀请链接会立即失效。已经接受的账号和成员关系不会被删除。: Revoking immediately disables the invite link. Accepted accounts and memberships are not deleted.
配置工作空间邮件发送服务器: Configure the workspace email delivery server
配置工作空间控制台、用户治理和个人能力的访问权限。: Control access to workspace administration, user governance, and personal capabilities.
角色仅属于当前组织，不会影响其他组织或自动向下级继承。: Roles belong only to this organization and do not affect or inherit into other organizations.
已分配给成员的角色不能删除。: Roles assigned to members cannot be deleted.
创建仅属于当前账号的 API Token，并限制它可使用的权限和有效期。: Create API tokens owned by your account and limit their permissions and expiration.
Token 的实际权限始终受当前账号权限限制；账号权限被撤销后立即生效。: A token is always limited by your current permissions; revoked account permissions take effect immediately.
当前工作空间角色不允许创建个人 API Token。: Your workspace role does not allow creating personal API tokens.
选择这个 Token 可以请求的权限和有效期。最终权限还会实时受当前账号约束。: Choose which permissions this token can request and when it expires. Your current account permissions still apply.
